title: Get Version
description: Retrieves reader component version information including Boot Loader, OS, Reader Application, and Radio Firmware versions.

command.description: The value for the key command must be get_version.

command_id.description: A unique ID that will be echoed back in the command response by the reader.

response.description: The execution status of the requested command.

availableOsUpgrades.description: A key-value map of available OS upgrade paths for the reader.

cloudAgentApplication.description: The version of the cloud agent application.

model.description: The hardware model identifier of the reader.

radioControlApplication.description: The version of the radio control application.

radioFirmware.description: The version of the firmware running on the radio module.

readerApplication.description: The version of the main reader application software.

revertBackFirmware.description: Details about the firmware version stored for rollback.

serialNumber.description: The unique serial number of the reader device.

payload.description: The object containing the component version information.
